summary: Frontend testing of collapsible sidebar feature complete. All core functionality working. Desktop: collapsed icon rail (56px) shown by default with logo, expand button, indigo + button, conversation icons, dashboard/vocabulary/logout icons. Expand/collapse toggle works. Tooltips appear on hover (some show duplicated text). Expanded sidebar (288px) shows language pickers, New Chat dropdown, conversation titles, Dashboard/Vocabulary links, user email, Logout. Mobile: collapsed rail hidden (lg:hidden), hamburger opens full sidebar overlay with backdrop blur, closes on X or backdrop click. Navigation from collapsed icons works.

issues: Tooltip text shows duplicated content on some icons (e.g., 'VocabularyVocabulary', 'New chatNew chat'). Minor visual bug, functionality works correctly.

passed_tests: Desktop (1920px): Sidebar starts in collapsed icon rail state by default
Collapsed rail shows: mumble logo, expand button (PanelLeftOpen icon), indigo + (new chat) button, conversation icons, dashboard/vocabulary/logout icons
Hovering over collapsed icons shows tooltips with labels (working for expand, vocabulary, new chat, conversation icons)
Clicking expand button expands to full sidebar (288px, w-72)
Expanded sidebar shows: language pickers, New Chat dropdown, conversation list with titles, Dashboard/Vocabulary links, user email, Logout
Clicking collapse button (PanelLeftClose icon) collapses back to icon rail
Clicking conversation icon in collapsed rail navigates to that conversation
New Chat dropdown works in collapsed state - creates conversation
New Chat dropdown works in expanded state
Mobile (390px): Collapsed rail is hidden (lg:hidden working)
Mobile: Hamburger menu opens full sidebar as overlay
Mobile: Closes on X button click
Mobile sidebar has all expected elements (logo, New Chat, conversations, Dashboard, Vocabulary, user email, Logout)
Dashboard navigation from collapsed rail works
Vocabulary navigation from collapsed rail works
critical_code_review_comments: Tooltip duplication issue: The TooltipContent wraps text in <span> but the tooltip text appears duplicated in DOM. May be a rendering artifact or Radix UI tooltip behavior. Low priority - functionality works.
Code quality: Sidebar.jsx is well-structured with clear separation (CollapsedRail, ExpandedSidebar, main Sidebar controller)
Proper use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Responsive design correctly implemented with lg:hidden and lg:flex classes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Collapsible sidebar fully tested and working. Desktop default state is collapsed (56px icon rail). Mobile uses overlay pattern with hamburger menu. Test IDs: collapsed state uses suffix '-collapsed' (e.g., sidebar-logo-collapsed, new-chat-btn-collapsed, conv-icon-{id}). Expanded state uses no suffix or '-link'/'-btn' (e.g., sidebar-logo, new-chat-btn, conv-item-{id}). Console 404 errors for /curriculum endpoint are expected (handled gracefully). Voice recording NOT tested (requires mic).
